scope: Port provider-aware structured-output request shaping, capability gates, and parsing into AgenC LLM adapters

requiredBehaviors: resolve native text-format support for xAI and OpenAI providers
resolve Anthropic structured output as a synthetic tool_use mode
fail closed for unsupported provider/model combinations
allow xAI structured output with tools only on Grok 4-family models
reject Grok code-fast structured output with tools before a provider request
allow Anthropic structured output to coexist with regular tool-loop tools
record structured-output support in the capability registry
commands: npm run test --workspace=@tetsuo-ai/runtime -- src/llm/structured-output.test.ts src/llm/provider-capabilities.test.ts src/llm/capabilities.test.ts

requiredBehaviors: serialize request-scoped json_schema contracts into Responses text.format
serialize request-scoped json_schema contracts into Chat Completions response_format
preserve other text controls such as verbosity while adding format
enforce strict OpenAI-compatible schema constraints recursively
parse provider JSON text back into LLMResponse.structuredOutput
edgeCases: optional properties converted to required under strict mode
uri format stripped before OpenAI-compatible strict schema submission
invalid or schema-violating provider JSON fails during parse
commands: npm run test --workspace=@tetsuo-ai/runtime -- src/llm/wire/responses-xai.test.ts src/llm/wire/responses-openai.test.ts src/llm/wire/chat-completions.test.ts src/llm/providers/openai/adapter.test.ts

requiredBehaviors: represent request-scoped structured output as a provider-facing synthetic tool
force Anthropic tool_choice to the structured output tool for a single-call structured response when no regular tools are present
append the structured output tool without forcing tool_choice when regular tools are present
parse the synthetic tool_use input into LLMResponse.structuredOutput
exclude the synthetic structured output tool_use from runtime toolCalls
suppress synthetic streaming tool-use progress events from downstream consumers
edgeCases: tool_use stop reason with only structured output maps to finishReason stop
streamed synthetic input_json_delta is accumulated but not emitted as a runtime tool
